production_metadata.display_name: SC003-SH001 旧井废口首帧参考帧

reference_inputs.display_name: 沈维桑全剧主角身份卡
reference_inputs.lock_usage: Lock Shen Weisang's hunter silhouette, costume palette, route pack, bow, and left-shoulder injury.

reference_inputs.display_name: 晏南枝全剧主角身份卡
reference_inputs.lock_usage: Lock Yan Nanzhi's fugitive robe, red-thread hair, restrained noble posture, and pale readable face/hands.

reference_inputs.display_name: 罗青禾医者母亲身份卡
reference_inputs.lock_usage: Use Luo Qinghe's herb/old-relay trace logic for the wall mark; do not show her alive in the present frame.

reference_inputs.display_name: 混血奴兵清污军户模板
reference_inputs.lock_usage: Lock the pursuer as a hybrid slave soldier with institutional servitude cues, not a pure insect soldier or official.

reference_inputs.display_name: 残阳坳村落与药屋主场景卡
reference_inputs.lock_usage: Lock the Canyangao old well, fire-aftermath village material, and old white-stone relay geography.
Lock the token as a worn half sun-moon relay token that triggers only broken old-route glints.

production_metadata.reference_input_policy: Reference inputs are production metadata for the generator operator. In an imagegen-task, attach the compressed task references as images when available, but do not copy ids, paths, source refs, or usage notes into the model-visible prompt.
production_metadata.history_policy: Only final approved image may live at output_path; retained intermediates must move to sibling history/ with .v001 suffixes.

asset_contract_status.action_required: none_for_targeted_prompt_generation; optional upscale before final video production

model_visible_prompt.visible_goal: 创建一张16:9横屏电影参考帧：午后火后旧井废口，两个逃亡者冲到旧井另一侧，旧井、白石井壁、隐藏暗门线索和追捕压力在同一画面里读清楚。
model_visible_prompt.style_quality: 超写实电影级低魔东方史诗；真实镜头高度、真实身体重量、自然接触反作用。材质要可触摸：旧白石、焦木、草绳、草药灰、旧皮革、粗麻布、烟灰、磨损金属和半枚旧令。火光与烟灰压低对比，但局部暖光必须勾出人物轮廓；画面是午后火场余烬中的暖土褐、旧木褐、草药青、烟灰与旧白石，不要变成全灰黑。
model_visible_prompt.subject_content: 主体是旧井废口和逃亡动作：年轻山路猎户带着贵族流亡少女冲到火后旧井另一侧。猎户是精瘦少年，灰褐猎衣、草药青内层、旧皮护腕、路线包、猎弓，左肩因旧伤略低；少女穿冷灰或雾紫流亡外袍，黑发红线束起，姿态仍有礼法训练但正在紧张奔逃。前景或近中景要能看见旧白石井壁上被草药灰遮住的刻痕，以及一只手或半枚旧令靠近石缝的动作。罗青禾不作为当前活人出现，只通过草药灰刻痕、医者遗留痕迹和旧井记忆被继承。远处井边有一个混血奴兵追到压力位置，蜡灰青短军袍、骨白腕绑、低位金钱马尾或抓捕器具可辨，但只是背景压力，不抢主体。
model_visible_prompt.composition_motion: 16:9横屏远景建立镜头，平视贴近人物并有慢推感。前景：草药灰刻痕、旧白石井沿、半枚旧令或手部动作，保持清楚但不变成特写。中景：两名逃亡者从火后旧井一侧冲入并停向另一侧，身体重心和脚步方向真实可读。背景：旧井口、井架、草绳陷阱材料、焦梁、低矮暗门 seam、烟灰和奴兵追来的方向。前景、中景、背景必须分层；大形清楚，细节克制，远处人物和废墟只做分组轮廓。
model_visible_prompt.visible_continuity: 保持低魔边界：半枚旧令只能引出短促、断续、很弱的金赤残纹反光，不能发成魔法光柱，不能完整开门，不能替代人物判断。旧井空间必须能看出火后残阳坳生活遗址，不是普通奇幻洞穴。肃明奴兵必须是混血清污军户层级，不能画成纯虫族士兵、官吏或白翳。火烟只用于空间层次和压力，不能遮住人物轮廓；不要把每块石头、每缕烟和远处碎屑画成同等细节。大形清楚、细节克制、远处对象成组。
model_visible_prompt.negative_prompt: 不要现代服饰、现代建筑、枪械、科幻界面、水印、字幕、对白文字、乱码、随机徽记、随机符号、塑料CG、过度磨皮、网红脸、漂浮慢动作、僵硬摆拍、全画面灰黑、主体不亮、烟雾吞掉人物、无因果大火、魔法光柱、完整发光门、罗青禾作为当前活人站在画面中、奴兵变成纯虫族怪物或白衣官吏、错误阵营服制、透明背景、孤立设定板背景。不要 equal-detail rendering across the whole frame, over-detailed distant figures, granular ash texture, particleized stone, noisy micro-detail, AI speckle, smoke pretending to be architectural detail, distant objects rendered as sharp individual miniatures, full-frame ultra-detail, visual information overload.

copy_ready.positive_prompt:
创建一张16:9横屏电影参考帧：午后火后旧井废口，两个逃亡者冲到旧井另一侧，旧井、白石井壁、隐藏暗门线索和追捕压力在同一画面里读清楚。

copy_ready.reference_image_instructions: 生成时只使用本次随附压缩参考图来继承角色、地点、道具和材质：猎户少年、贵族流亡少女、医者遗留痕迹、混血奴兵、残阳坳旧井空间、半枚旧令。参考图负责锁定身份、服装、道具、空间和材质，不要把资产编号、文件路径或生产备注写入画面。
copy_ready.chatgpt_image_prompt:
请生成一张图像。只使用本次随附压缩参考图继承角色、地点、道具和材质；不要读取文件，不要把路径、资产编号或生产备注写入画面。

required_views: single cinematic frame matching project delivery ratio
clear camera distance and camera angle
screen direction and action state locked for the target shot
lighting, weather/time, and fire-smoke state visible in-frame

composition_layers.foreground: herb-ash-covered carved mark, old white stone edge, half relay token or hand beat
composition_layers.midground: Shen Weisang and Yan Nanzhi running to the far side of the ruined old well
composition_layers.background: ruined old-well mouth, well frame, low hidden-door seam, controlled fire-smoke pressure, distant slave soldier

qc_checks: foreground, midground, and background are visibly separated
no transparent or isolated card background
camera distance, angle, lighting, time of day, screen direction, and action state are readable
Shen Weisang and Yan Nanzhi remain readable without becoming close-up beauty portraits
Luo Qinghe appears only through inherited herb-ash mark evidence, not as a present living figure
distant repeated forms stay grouped and non-granular
no watermarks, modern UI, random text, or wrong faction symbols
output_format.canvas_aspect_ratio_notes: 16:9 landscape widescreen; required for scene, shot, or composition-board use
output_format.minimum_resolution_notes: 4096x2304 required; the built-in image generator may return a lower 16:9 size and should be recorded honestly before downstream production scaling.
output_format.video_use_policy: may be used as a landscape video/scene reference after QC
